1091401.name: Energy Strike - 'That's What You Get for Giving Us Holiday Shifts!'

descs.desc:
At 5+ [Charge] Count, Coin Power +1
[DefeatDuel] Gain 4 [Sinking] and +3 [Charge] Count

Deal +12.5% damage for every [Charge] on self (max 50%)
At 2+ [Charge], Coin Power +1
At 5+ [Charge] Count, Coin Power +1
[DefeatDuel] Gain 4 [Sinking] and +4 [Charge] Count

1091402.name: Concentration - 'Burst and Pop with Christmas Colors!"

descs.desc:
Coin Power +1 for every 5 [Charge] Count (max 2)
[DefeatDuel] Gain 5 [Sinking] and +2 [Charge] Count
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] At less than 8 [Charge] Count, gain 5 [Sinking] and +4 [Charge] Count (once per turn)

descs.desc:
Deal +15% damage for every [Charge] on self (max 60%)
Coin Power +1 for every 5 [Charge] Count (max 2)
[DefeatDuel] Gain 5 [Sinking] and +5 [Charge] Count
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] At less than 8 [Charge] Count, gain 5 [Sinking] and +4 [Charge] Count (once per turn)
[OnSucceedAttack] At 8+ [Charge] Count, consume 4 [Charge] Count and inflict 1 [HitTakeDamageUp] next turn (once per turn)

1091403.name: Mind Whip - 'Ahaha... Look, Everyone! We're the Fireworks this Christmas!'

descs.desc:
Deal +5% damage for every [Charge] (max 20%)
[WhenUse] At 5~9 [Charge] Count:
- Gain 5 [Sinking] and +5 [Charge] Count
- This Skill gains the following attributes: [CantIdentify], [WideAreaRampage], and Atk Weight +1
- [BeforeUse] At 3+ [Charge], this Skill does not gain the [CantIdentify] effect
[WhenUse] At 10+ [Charge] Count, consume all [Charge] Count to gain the following effects:
- Coin Power +1
- Deal +6% damage for every 1 excess [Charge] Count consumed past 10 (max 30%)
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +3 [Sinking] Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Raise Stagger Threshold by 10% of damage dealt

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Sinking]
[OnSucceedAttack] Raise Stagger Threshold by 10% of damage dealt

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Sinking]
[OnSucceedAttack] Raise Stagger Threshold by 10% of damage dealt

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Sinking]
[OnSucceedAttack] Raise Stagger Threshold by 5% of damage dealt

descs.desc:
Deal +10% damage for every [Charge] (max 40%)
[WhenUse] At 5~9 [Charge] Count:
- Gain 5 [Sinking] and +5 [Charge] Count
- This Skill gains the following attributes: [CantIdentify], [WideAreaRampage], and Atk Weight +1
- [BeforeUse] At 3+ [Charge], this Skill does not gain the [CantIdentify] effect
[WhenUse] At 10+ [Charge] Count, consume all [Charge] Count to gain the following effects:
- Coin Power +2
- Deal +12% damage for every 1 excess [Charge] Count consumed past 10 (max 60%)
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict +3 [Sinking] Count
[OnSucceedAttack] Raise Stagger Threshold by 10% of damage dealt
- At 3+ [Charge], raise Stagger Threshold by 20% of damage dealt instead

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Sinking]
[OnSucceedAttack] Raise Stagger Threshold by 10% of damage dealt

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Sinking]
[OnSucceedAttack] Raise Stagger Threshold by 10% of damage dealt

[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Sinking]
[OnSucceedAttack] Raise Stagger Threshold by 5% of damage dealt

1091404.name: Energy Condensation - 'Haha! Everybody's Sparkling and Glittering!'

descs.desc:
[WhenUse] At 5+ [Charge] Count, Base Power +2
[WhenUse] Gain +3 [Charge] Count (2 times per turn)

1091401.name: Jolly Antlers
1091401.desc:
Gain 1 [Charge] every time this unit consumes 10 cumulative [Charge] Count in this Encounter

When using a Base Attack Skill that inflicts [Sinking] Potency, if the main target does not have [Sinking], this unit gains 5 [Sinking] and doubles the amount of Sinking Potency the Skill applies (once per turn; in Focused Encounters, the Part)

1091411.name: Jolly Antlers
1091411.desc:
Gain 1 [Charge] every time this unit consumes 10 cumulative [Charge] Count in this Encounter

When using a Base Attack Skill that inflicts [Sinking] Potency, if the main target does not have [Sinking], this unit gains 5 [Sinking] and doubles the amount of Sinking Potency the Skill applies (once per turn; in Focused Encounters, the Part)

At less than 35% HP, Base Attack Skills gain Final Power +1

1091421.name: Carol of Dying Comrades
1091421.desc: 1 ally with the lowest SP: Skills that consume [Charge] or Unique Charge[TabExplain] and have effects that inflict [Sinking] against enemies deal +10% damage (except E.G.O Skills)
